revision.comment: new key for [[Category:13th-century religious buildings and structures]]: " +Buddhist temples" using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
revision.text:
This category is about Buddhist temples built in the 13th century. {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Buddhist temples by century| 13]] [[Category:13th-century religious buildings and structures| +Buddhist temples]] [[Category:13th-century Buddhism|Temp]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (6 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=13th-century_Buddhist_temples here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
